sys_security_acl.description: Allow read for approval_status in x_1861622_laptop_0_laptop_approval, for users with roles (x_1861622_laptop_0.x_yourinitials_laptop_requester, x_1861622_laptop_0.x_yourinitials_laptop_approver).
